/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/Actor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/Collectable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/CharacterActor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/CommandListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/DisplayOverlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/DrawPhysics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/GameOverlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/InputHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/MainMenuScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/PhysicsObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/PhysicsContactHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/Scarfy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/ScarfyScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/TextureAtlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/TileMap2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/TileMap2DLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/TileMap2DScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scarfy.dir/TrackingCamera2D.cpp.o -o Scarfy  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a ThirdParty/box2d/bin/libbox2d.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so _deps/raylib-build/raylib/external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
